_doc: Manual override for upcoming-earnings dates. Used by scripts/fetch_earnings_window.py and scripts/screen_candidates.py. Add an entry whenever you know an SP100 ticker's next earnings date and FMP doesn't have it (FMP free tier returns ~25 rows/week, missing many SP100 names). Manual entries override FMP on conflict. Re-validate at least once per month.

_schema.date: YYYY-MM-DD of the announcement (use the announce date, not fiscal-quarter-end)
